rationale.D1: YAGSL vendored swerve abstraction is present (src/main/deploy/swerve/kraken configs) and YAMS library wrappers (TalonFXWrapper, FlyWheel, Pivot) wrap hardware, but there are zero *IO interfaces in the codebase — the index confirmed this — so it is a partial/vendored abstraction, not a full IO layer.
rationale.D2: ScoringSystem.java and ShootOnTheMoveCommand.java are 100% commented out and not instantiated; what runs is flat button bindings in RobotContainer directly calling subsystem commands with no coordinator or state machine — confirmed level 1 command composition only.
rationale.D3: Every mechanism subsystem implements simulationPeriodic() calling YAMS simIterate() (confirmed in ShooterSubsystem, TurretSubsystem, IntakeArmSubsystem), Vision.java sets up PhotonCameraSim, and Telemetry.java references ironmaple SimulatedArena — mechanism physics sim via the YAMS library abstraction.
rationale.D4: No src/test directory exists and no .github/workflows files were found — confirmed zero tests and no CI.
rationale.D5: DataLogManager.start() is called in RobotContainer and SmartDashboard.put* calls are scattered through subsystems (TurretSubsystem, GameData, ShootOnTheMoveCommand) with YAMS updateTelemetry() calls; no AdvantageKit, DogLog, or Epilogue present — between dashboard values and structured logging.
rationale.D6: AutoBuilder.configure() is wired in SwerveSubsystem.setupPathPlanner(), multiple real .path and .auto files exist (1st Approach, RotateShoot, Shoot then Gather), and pathfindToPose/driveToPose are implemented — confirmed PathPlanner adoption at level 2.
rationale.D7: PhotonVision and addVisionMeasurement code exists in Vision.java with dynamic std-dev tuning, but SwerveSubsystem.visionOdometer is hardcoded to false so setupPhotonVision() is never called and vision measurements are never fed to the estimator at runtime — intentionally disabled.
rationale.D8: Five seasons of repos tracked and a library folder exists, but the 2026 season repo has no README (only WPILib-License.md), no .github/workflows, and no contributing docs — basic hygiene only, carrying multi-year history but not yet CI or standards documentation.

D1: src/main/deploy/swerve/kraken/swervedrive.json — YAGSL config dir confirming vendored swerve abstraction
src/main/java/frc/robot/subsystems/ShooterSubsystem.java:65 — TalonFXWrapper wraps hardware but no IO interface above it
